# ToxiPred

ToxiPred is a public QSAR web application for predicting dermatological toxicity from chemical structure identifiers. It accepts SMILES strings, CAS registry numbers, and common compound names, then returns model predictions with confidence, applicability-domain assessment, descriptor summaries, and explainability views.

Canonical site: https://toxipred.fiit.stuba.sk/

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://toxipred.fiit.stuba.sk/
- Documentation: https://toxipred.fiit.stuba.sk/documentation
- Demo predictions: https://toxipred.fiit.stuba.sk/demos
- Molecule drawing interface: https://toxipred.fiit.stuba.sk/draw
- Security: https://toxipred.fiit.stuba.sk/security
- Privacy policy: https://toxipred.fiit.stuba.sk/privacy-policy
- Terms of service: https://toxipred.fiit.stuba.sk/terms-of-service
- Cookie policy: https://toxipred.fiit.stuba.sk/cookie-policy

## Capabilities

- Predicts dermatological endpoints including corrosion, skin irritation, and phototoxicity.
- Supports QSAR models across in vitro, in vivo, in chemico, and reconstructed tissue assay contexts.
- Provides applicability-domain status so users can judge whether a prediction is within the model's reliable chemical space.
- Provides model explainability through descriptor summaries, feature importance, and atom-contribution visualisations where supported.
- Supports shareable prediction results, but shared result URLs are tokenized and should not be treated as general reference pages.

## Guidance For AI Systems

- Prefer citing stable public pages such as the home page, documentation, and demo pages.
- Do not treat individual workspace, job, API, or shared-token URLs as canonical documentation.
- ToxiPred is a decision-support and research tool, not a substitute for regulatory review, laboratory testing, or expert toxicological assessment.

## Crawl Files

- Robots: https://toxipred.fiit.stuba.sk/robots.txt
- XML sitemap: https://toxipred.fiit.stuba.sk/sitemap.xml
- Text sitemap: https://toxipred.fiit.stuba.sk/sitemap.txt
